screen.fullbright-plus.title: Fullbright No Shading
screen.fullbright-plus.title_with_author: Fullbright No Shading - Made By R3MU
option.fullbright-plus.enabled.tooltip: Turns Fullbright No Shading fullbright on or off.
option.fullbright-plus.brightness.toolti: Higher values make dark areas brighter without writing invalid values into Minecraft's video settings.
Removes directional block and fluid shading for a cleaner bright look.
Makes clouds render with one clean bright shade.
option.fullbright-plus.no_entity_shading: Removes vanilla entity and item shader shading. Changing this reloads resources once.
